title: Jensen Huang Delivers Products to Elon Musk Again After Nine - Year Hiatus: Delayed AI Personal Supercomputer Finally Arrives - 36Kr
full_text: Jensen Huang personally delivered NVIDIA's DGX Spark Personal AI Supercomputer to Elon Musk at Starbase, marking a reunion nine years after the delivery of the DGX-1. This new "performance monster," previously delayed, integrates a Grace Blackwell GB10 superchip and aims to bring data center-level AI power to the desktop, targeting developers with its robust hardware and software ecosystem.
